title: Side Flood Variation
intendedTensionBeat: The endangered puppy is not simply at the bottom; board shape makes the player read water direction and route exposure.
intendedReleaseBeat: Correctly reading the threatened route opens a clean pivot to the safer puppy.
expectedPath: Identify which puppy is exposed to water first, clear its route, extract, then pivot through the opened lane to finish the other.
expectedFailMode: Player assumes the visually closest target is the priority and misses the actual water-exposed route.
designNotes: Variation level: same water-order concept in a different geometry. Keep forecast/rise states visually unambiguous.
